DISCOVERY 612, NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. DEFENDANT AND CROSS-COMPLAINANT TIBURON RESEARCH GROUP INC.'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO FORM INTERROGATORIES, SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES, AND REQUESTS FOR PRODUCTION IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED. CROSS-DEFENDANTS KELLY MCKEAN, BLUE CORNER, INC., AND BUYU, INC. HAVE FAILED TO RESPOND. CROSS-DEFENDANTS' FAILURE TO RESPOND WAS A MISUSE OF THE DISCOVERY PROCESS. CROSS-DEFENDANTS ARE ORDERED TO RESPOND WITHIN 15 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED IN THE AMOUNT OF $623.80, TO BE PAID WITHIN 30 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
PANEL OF ARBITRATORS ASSIGNED. REJECTION DATE JAN-06-2005.
DEFENDANT(S) REJECTED PROPOSED ARBITRATOR BARBARA SUZANNE FARLEY.
ARBITRATOR JAMES ATTRIDGE APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION JAN-07-2005 THROUGH APR-07-2005.

DISCOVERY, 612, NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. DEFENDANT AND CROSS-COMPLAINANT ROB WILSON'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES AND FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR. THE COURT DOES NOT HAVE A PROOF OF SERVICE. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

DISCOVERY 612, NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. DEFENDANT'S MOTION FOR SANCTIONS FOR DISOBEDIENCE OF PRIOR COURT ORDER IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED. THE COURT FINDS THAT ADDITIONAL ORDERS TO PARTICIPATE IN DISCOVERY WOULD NOT RESULT IN COMPLIANCE. AS TO PLAINTIFFS'/CROSS-DEFENDANTS' BLUE CORNER, INC. AND BUYU, INC. AND CROSS-DEFENDANT KELLY MCKEAN, THE FOLLOWING SANCTIONS ARE IMPOSED: PLAINTIFFS' FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS ORDERED DISMISSED; CROSS-DEFENDANT KELLY MCKEAN'S ANSWER IS ORDERED STRICKEN. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT AND CROSS-COMPLAINT BY TIBURON RESEARCH GROUP AND CROSS-COMPLAINT BY ROB WILSON AND ENTIRE ACTION
